divergences.description: Google Docs uninspected — no API credentials available
divergences.impact: Cannot verify architecture/product docs match code state

divergences.description: EOS schema v1 (projections/eos/integration/tables.py: crm_contacts, crm_deals, crm_activities) vs v2 (saas/db/schema.ts: events, clients, ventures, transactions, offers)
divergences.impact: Two incompatible schema models for the same projection — agents query v2 tables but integration polls v1 tables

divergences.description: /opt/OS/saas is a partial EOS backend — Hono API + Drizzle schema but no frontend, no deployment proof
divergences.impact: Cannot build features on saas/ without knowing if it's canonical or superseded by Beast source

divergences.description: 7-file integration pattern duplicated across projections/eos, projections/creatoros, projections/lyfeos — 503 diff lines between EOS and CreatorOS tables.py alone
divergences.impact: Bug fixes or pattern changes must be applied 3x; shared code should be extracted

divergences.description: saas/db/schema.ts missing 7 tables that exist in migrations (model_preferences, cross_product_permissions, user_intelligence_profiles, product_connections, higgsfield_jobs, goals, goal_outcomes); migration 0004 missing from sequence
divergences.impact: Schema.ts does not represent full database state

divergences.description: saas/db/schema.ts uses text type for org_id/venture_id in clients/transactions/offers but uuid FK in ventures.org_id
divergences.impact: Type inconsistency across tables — potential join/FK issues

divergences.description: saas/db/seed.ts contains instance-specific values (founder name, company names, product names, projection-specific DB role)
divergences.impact: Seed data is not portable to other UMH instances

divergences.description: EOS canonical source unknown — 3 competing locations (projections/eos, saas/, Windows /dev)
divergences.impact: Cannot build EOS features without operator decision on canonical source

divergences.description: CreatorOS full source location unknown — only integration skeleton on VPS
divergences.impact: Cannot verify CreatorOS state without Beast/GitHub inspection

divergences.description: LyfeOS full source location unknown — only integration skeleton on VPS
16 substrate files still contain projection name references (EntrepreneurOS, CreatorOS, LyfeOS) — legacy aliases and hardcoded names
divergences.impact: Projection boundary law violations — tech debt from pre-convergence era

divergences.description: umh/voice_server.py sits outside standard architecture layers — orphaned directory
Split test locations: tests/ (80 files) and substrate/organism/tests/ (~200 files)
divergences.impact: Inconsistent test discovery; potential for missed tests in CI

divergences.description: EOS auth system DIVERGED: Beast uses Clerk, VPS saas/ uses UMH platform auth. Cannot merge without auth decision.
divergences.impact: Fundamental architectural incompatibility between Beast EOS and VPS EOS

divergences.description: Beast EOS schema is monolith Replit-era (all tables in one shared/schema.ts). VPS saas/ has separated UMH platform tables from EOS tables. Different structures for same data.
divergences.impact: Schema migration required regardless of which direction is chosen

divergences.description: Two OS repo copies on Beast: dev/OS (current) and Projects/OS (stale, pre-convergence). Projects/OS should be deleted.
divergences.impact: Confusion about which is current; wasted disk space

divergences.description: 5 empty placeholder directories on Beast: Initiate Arena, OSv2, REAL FUTURE LLM, REAL FUTURE OS, UMH
Beast dev/OS behind VPS main by several commits — Beast has worldview design as latest, VPS has Phase 14.0R commits
